report.name: PENPRN_DEC_INSTANCE_OTH_DEATH

dataSource.name: Q_1
dataSource.select: SELECT COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_DOMAIN_TYPE, COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_NAME, PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_NAME, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO||'-'||TO_CHAR(PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPL_DATE,'DD/MM/RRRR'), PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PROTOCOL_NO, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.AWARD_BRANCH, REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID, REG_INSURED.SEX, REG_INSURED.SURNAME||' '||REG_INSURED.NAME, REG_INSURED.FATHER_NAME, REG_INSURED.MOTHER_NAME, REG_INSURED.AMKA_ID, REG_INSURED.TAXATION_ID, DECODE(REG_INSURED.SEX,'Α','του δικαιούχου ','Θ','της δικαιούχου '), REG_INSURED.DATE_OF_BIRTH, REG_INSURED.DATE_OF_DEATH, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.INSTITUTION_CODE FROM REG_INSURED, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES, COM_ORG_BRANCHES, PEN_BE_PER_PRODINST, PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS, PEN_PRODUCTS, COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION WHERE PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE=:P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_DOCUMENT_TYPE_APPL_CODE='00001' AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR=:P_APPL_YEAR AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID=PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID AND PEN_BE_PER_PRODINST.BE_PER_PRODINST_CODE=:P_BE_PER_PRODINST AND PEN_BE_PER_PRODINST.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTION_CODE AND COM_PENSION_IKA_INSTITUTION.PENSION_IKA_INST_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.INSTITUTION_CODE AND PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE=PEN_PRODUCT_PER_INSTITUTIONS.PRODUCT_CODE AND COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_CODE=:P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR;

dataItem.name: DECODE_REG_INSURED_SEX_Α_του_δ
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode Reg Insured Sex Α Του Δ

dataSource.name: Q_10
dataSource.select: SELECT ' ' AMOUNT_DESCR, 1 AMOUNT, ' ' SUM_INDICATOR, ' ' CALCULATION_FLG FROM DUAL;

dataSource.name: Q_11
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID_IND AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR= :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR= '1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='0' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_12
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID_IND AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR= :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR= '1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='1' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE

dataSource.name: Q_19
dataSource.select: SELECT a.SURNAME, a.NAME, a.FATHER_NAME, a.MOTHER_NAME, a.INSURED_ID, a.DATE_OF_BIRTH, a.AMKA_ID, a.TAXATION_ID, a.SURNAME||' '|| a.NAME FULLNAME, DECODE(A.SEX,'Α','του δικαιούχου ','Θ','της δικαιούχου ') FROM REG_INSURED a WHERE a.INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID_IND

dataItem.name: DECODE_A_SEX_Α_του_δικαιούχου_
dataItem.defaultLabel: Decode A Sex Α Του Δικαιούχου

dataSource.name: Q_18
dataSource.select: SELECT REG_INSURED.SURNAME||' '||REG_INSURED.NAME, REG_INSURED.DATE_OF_BIRTH, PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_TYPE, PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_NAME FROM PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES, REG_INSURED, PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE_DEATH WHERE PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE_DEATH.GROUP_ID = :P_GROUP_ID AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE_DEATH.INSURED_ID!=:P_INSURED_ID_IND AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE_DEATH.DEPENDENCY_TYPE_DEC='00001' AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE_DEATH.DEPENDENCY_TYPE_DEC=PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_TYPE AND PEN_DECISION_INSTANCE_DEATH.INSURED_ID=REG_INSURED.INSURED_ID ORDER BY PEN_DEPENDANT_TYPES.DEPENDENCY_TYPE

dataSource.name: Q_9
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT PEN_RULES.CONDITION FROM PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM,PEN_RULES,PEN_QUERY_TYPES,PEN_ACCOUNT,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS,PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO= :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO_DIR AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERMS.TYPE='0' AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_RULES.RULE_CODE = PEN_RULE_PER_QUALIF_TERM.RULE_RULE_CODE AND PEN_RULES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE = PEN_QUERY_TYPES.QUERY_TYPE_CODE AND PEN_QUERY_TYPES.CONCERN_DAYS_FLG = 2;

dataSource.name: Q_20
dataSource.select: SELECT decode(BEN_ACCIDENT_ELEMENTS.AT_ACCIDENT_TYPE_ID,'00001','Ημ/νία Ατυχήματος (Εργατικού): ','00002','Ημ/νία Ατυχήματος (Εκτός Εργασίας): '), BEN_ACCIDENT_ELEMENTS.ACC_DATE, BEN_ACCIDENT_ELEMENTS.STATEMENT_DATE FROM BEN_ACCIDENT_ELEMENTS , PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE WHERE PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_DIR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_DIR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR= :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_DIR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR= '1' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.TITLE_CODE ='00075' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE = '00034' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND BEN_ACCIDENT_ELEMENTS.ACC_NO = PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.VALUE

dataSource.name: Q_14
dataSource.select: SELECT QUAL_PENSION_RIGHT_DATE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT WHERE ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO_DIR;

dataSource.name: Q_21
dataSource.select: SELECT VALUE FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE WHERE PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR = '1' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID_IND AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.TITLE_CODE = '01053' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE = '00055';

dataSource.name: Q_22
dataSource.select: SELECT ' ' INSURANCE_FROM, ' ' INSURANCE_TO, 1 INSURANCE_DAYS, ' ' TRANS_DESCR, ' ' DESCRIPTION, ' ' DESCRIPTION2 FROM DUAL;

dataSource.name: Q_2
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE, PEN_PRODUCTS WHERE PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR = '1' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID_IND AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.TITLE_CODE = '00004' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE = '00011' AND PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE(+)=PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.VALUE ;

dataSource.name: Q_3
dataSource.select: SELECT COM_PENSION_INSTITUTIONS.PENSION_INST_NAME FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance,COM_PENSION_INSTITUTIONS WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code='00004' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR = '1' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID_IND AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00010' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=COM_PENSION_INSTITUTIONS.PENSION_INST_CODE(+) order by GROUP_INCR_SEQ_NO;

dataSource.name: Q_4
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION, 'ΙΚΑ' FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE, PEN_PRODUCTS WHERE PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR = '1' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID_IND AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.TITLE_CODE = '00174' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE = '00011' AND PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE(+)=PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.VALUE order by GROUP_INCR_SEQ_NO;

dataSource.name: Q_5
dataSource.select: SELECT SUM(PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL), MIN(TO_DATE(1||'/'||nvl(MONTH,12)||'/'||nvl(YEAR,4000))), LAST_DAY(MAX(TO_DATE(1||'/'||NVL(MONTH,1)||'/'||NVL(YEAR,1000)))) FROM PEN_INSURED_DAYS WHERE PEN_INSURED_DAYS.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO= NVL(FIND_DEAD_REAL_ACCOUNT(:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO_DIR),:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO_DIR) AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INS_INSURED_ID= :P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.USE_FLG='1' AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL IS NOT NULL AND PEN_INSURED_DAYS.INSURANCE_DAYS_CALC_FINAL!=0;

dataItem.name: MIN_TO_DATE_1_nvl_MONTH_12_nvl
dataItem.defaultLabel: Min To Date 1 Nvl Month 12 Nvl

dataDescriptor.expression: MIN ( TO_DATE ( 1 || '/' || nvl ( MONTH , 12 ) || '/' || nvl ( YEAR , 4000 ) ) )

dataItem.name: LAST_DAY_MAX_TO_DATE_1_NVL_MON
dataItem.defaultLabel: Last Day Max To Date 1 Nvl Mon

dataDescriptor.expression: LAST_DAY ( MAX ( TO_DATE ( 1 || '/' || NVL ( MONTH , 1 ) || '/' || NVL ( YEAR , 1000 ) ) ) )

dataSource.name: Q_6
dataSource.select: SELECT END_DATE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT WHERE ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO;

dataSource.name: Q_7
dataSource.select: SELECT COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_NAME FROM COM_ORG_BRANCHES, PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES WHERE PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.APPLICATION_INCR_SEQ_NO=:P_APPL_INCR_SEQ_NO AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE=:P_APPL_UNIT_CODE AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_DOCUMENT_TYPE_APPL_CODE='00001' AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.PDTA_APPLICATION_YEAR=:P_APPL_YEAR AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_APPLICATION_INSTANCES.AWARD_BRANCH=COM_ORG_BRANCHES.BRANCH_CODE

dataSource.name: Q_8
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_PRODUCTS.PROCUCT_DESCRIPTION FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE, PEN_PRODUCTS WHERE PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_DIR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_DIR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_DIR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR = '1' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.TITLE_CODE = '00180' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE = '00011' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.VALUE =PEN_PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CODE(+);

dataSource.name: Q_15
dataSource.select: SELECT COM_PENSION_INSTITUTIONS.PENSION_INST_NAME FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE, COM_PENSION_INSTITUTIONS WHERE PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_DIR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_DIR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_DIR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR = '1' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.TITLE_CODE = '00180' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE = '00010' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.VALUE =COM_PENSION_INSTITUTIONS.PENSION_INST_CODE(+);

dataSource.name: Q_16
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO_DIR AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_DIR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_DIR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR= :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_DIR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR= '1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='0' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE;

dataSource.name: Q_17
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.TXT_DESCR, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE FROM PEN_ACCOUNT, PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE,PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS WHERE PEN_ACCOUNT.ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO_DIR AND PEN_ACCOUNT.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_SUBTERM_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_SUBTERMS.QUALIFYING_TERM_CODE=PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_CODE AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_DIR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_DIR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR= :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_DIR AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR= '1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.CHOOCE_FLG='1' AND PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.RULE_OR_QUAL_FLG='1' ORDER BY PEN_TEXTS_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.PRN_SEQUENCE;

dataSource.name: Q_23
dataSource.select: SELECT VALUE FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE WHERE PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_DIR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_DIR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_DIR AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR = '1' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.TITLE_CODE = '00185' AND PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE = '00287' ;

dataSource.name: Q_24
dataSource.select: SELECT PEN_QT_PER_BE_CC_PER_ACCOUNT.CC_PER_BE_TYPE_PER_DECINS_UPD, PEN_QT_PER_BE_CC_PER_ACCOUNT.BCC_QUAL_TERM_PER_BE_CC_CODE FROM PEN_QT_PER_BE_CC_PER_ACCOUNT,PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE_CC,PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_CC, PEN_BE_PER_CALCUL_CATEGORY,PEN_CALCULATION_CATEGORY WHERE PEN_QT_PER_BE_CC_PER_ACCOUNT.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO=:P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO AND PEN_QT_PER_BE_CC_PER_ACCOUNT.BCC_QUAL_TERM_PER_BE_CC_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE_CC.QUAL_TERM_PER_BE_CC_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE_CC.QUALIF_TERM_PER_CC_CODE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_CC.QUALIF_TERM_PER_CC_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_CC.BE_PER_CALCUL_CATEGORY_CO=PEN_BE_PER_CALCUL_CATEGORY.BE_PER_CALCUL_CATEGORY_CODE AND PEN_BE_PER_CALCUL_CATEGORY.CALCULATION_CATEGORY_CODE=PEN_CALCULATION_CATEGORY.CALCULATION_CATEGORY_CODE AND PEN_CALCULATION_CATEGORY.CALCULATION_TYPE_FLG='15';

dataItem.name: CC_PER_BE_TYPE_PER_DECINS_UPD
dataItem.defaultLabel: Cc Per Be Type Per Decins Upd

dataItem.name: BCC_QUAL_TERM_PER_BE_CC_CODE
dataItem.defaultLabel: Bcc Qual Term Per Be Cc Code

dataSource.name: Q_25
dataSource.select:
/*SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.PERCENTAGE FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code IN ('00069','00159') AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :P_INSURED_ID_IND AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+);*/
SELECT PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.PERCENTAGE FROM pen_dec_fact_types_instance, PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code in ('00069','00159') AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :P_INSURED_ID_IND AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code = '00228' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.VALUE=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.SICKNESS_DEDUCTION_ID(+) AND :P_ACC_START_DATE >=PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE ORDER BY PEN_SICKNESS_DEDUCTIONS_NEW.EFFECTIVE_DATE DESC;

dataSource.name: Q_26
Q_27
dataSource.select: SELECT DECODE(value, '1','ΝΑΙ', '0', 'ΟΧΙ', '2', 'ΔΕΝ ΑΦΟΡΑ') value FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE WHERE pen_dec_fact_types_instance.title_code IN ('00157') AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.ins_insured_id= :P_INSURED_ID_IND AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND pen_dec_fact_types_instance.dec_fact_type_code IN ( '00039')

dataSource.name: Q_28
dataSource.select: SELECT 1 FROM PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE, PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE, PEN_BE_PER_PRODINST, PEN_BE_PER_QUAL_CAT, PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS WHERE PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS.STATE='0'--ΜΗ ΘΕΜΕΛΙΩΤΙΚΟ AND PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS.BUSSINESS_EVENT_GROUP='4'--ΑΝ ΠΡΟΚΕΙΤΑΙ ΓΙΑ ΠΡΟΣΑΥΞΗΣΗ Α.Α. AND PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS.REQUIRE_PENSION_FLAG='0'--ΔΕΝ ΧΡΕΙΑΖΕΤΑΙ ΝΑ ΠΑΙΡΝΕΙ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗ AND PEN_BE_PER_PRODINST.BUSS_EVENT_CODE=PEN_BUSSINESS_EVENTS.BUSS_EVENT_CODE AND PEN_BE_PER_QUAL_CAT.BE_PER_PRODINST_CODE=PEN_BE_PER_PRODINST.BE_PER_PRODINST_CODE AND PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE.BE_PER_QUAL_CATEGORY_CODE=PEN_BE_PER_QUAL_CAT.BE_PER_QUAL_CATEGORY_CODE AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.QUAL_TERM_PER_BE=PEN_QUALIFYING_TERM_PER_BE.QUALIF_TERM_PER_BE_CODE AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR= :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR= :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR= :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.INS_INSURED_ID=:P_INSURED_ID_IND AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.BE_TYPE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE_FLG ='1' AND PEN_BE_PER_DEC_INSTANCE.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_CODE_SR ='1' ;

dataSource.name: Q_29
dataSource.select: SELECT 1 DAYS, ' ' INSURANCE_FROM, ' ' INSURANCE_TO, ' ' DESCRIPTION FROM DUAL;

dataSource.name: Q_13
dataSource.select: SELECT A.VALUE, A.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE FROM PEN_DEC_FACT_TYPES_INSTANCE A WHERE A.title_code='00368' AND A.DI_DOCUMENT_TYPE_DEC_COCE_SR ='1' AND A.DI_DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO_SR = :P_DT_INCR_SEC_NO_SR AND A.DI_DECISION_YEAR_SR = :P_DT_DECISION_YEAR_SR AND A.DI_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR = :P_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE_SR AND A.INS_INSURED_ID = :P_INSURED_ID_IND AND A.VALUE IS NOT NULL AND A.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE IN ('00510','00511','00512','00513','00514') ORDER BY A.DEC_FACT_TYPE_CODE

dataSource.name: Q_30
dataSource.select: SELECT A.INSURANCE_CLASS, A.PERIOD_YEAR_FROM || '-' || A.PERIOD_YEAR_TO PERIOD, A.NOTICE_TOTAL_SALARY, A.NOTICE_TOTAL_DAYS, A.PERIOD_YEAR_TO FROM PEN_SUMMARIZATION_PER_INSURED A WHERE A.PROCESS_ID = :P_PROCESS_ID

dataSource.name: Q_31
dataSource.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL

dataSource.name: Q_32
dataSource.select: select DEBT_ID, DEDUCTION_PENSION_FACTOR, DOSAGE_AMOUNT, TOTAL_DEDUCTION_AMMOUNT, b.descr, rownum num_debt from PEN_DEC_INSTANCE_DEBTS a, ppi_deduction_types b WHERE DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE= :p_DT_DEC_UNIT_CODE AND DT_DECISION_YEAR= :p_DT_DECISION_YEAR AND DEC_INCR_SEQ_NO = :P_DECISION_NO and a.DEBT_ID=b.code(+) AND a.STATUS='1'

dataSource.name: Q_33
dataSource.select: SELECT INITIAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT INITIAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT_DEC, STAY_GREECE_YEARS STAY_GREECE_YEARS_DEC, INSURANCE_YEARS INSURANCE_YEARS_DEC, INS_YEARS_REDUCTION INS_YEARS_REDUCTION_DEC, STAY_GR_YEARS_REDUCTION STAY_GR_YEARS_REDUCTION_DEC, AGE_LIMIT_REDUCTION AGE_LIMIT_REDUCTION_DEC, FINAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT FINAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT_DEC, FINAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT*(:P_PERCENTAGE/100) FINAL_NAT_PENSION_AMT_MEMBER, DISABIL_PENSION_REDUCTION DISABIL_PENSION_REDUCTION_DEC FROM PEN_CALC_NATIONAL_RESULTS WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO_DIR

dataSource.name: Q_35
dataSource.select: SELECT DISTINCT TOTAL_YEARS TOTAL_YEARS_DEC, POSOSTO_ANAPL POSOSTO_ANAPL_DEC, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT ADAPODOTIKH_AMT_DEC, ADAPODOTIKH_AMT*(:P_PERCENTAGE/100) ADAPODOTIKH_AMT_MEMBER, TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB_DEC, ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB_DEC, NVL(POSOSTO_ANAPL,0)+NVL(ADAPOD_PERCENT_KSB,0) TOTAL_ANAPL_PERCENT_DEC, ADAPODOTIKH_INITIAL, ADAPODOTIKH_ADD_TSMEDE, TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB_TSMEDE*100 TOTAL_PERCENT_KSB_TSMEDE FROM PEN_CALC_ADAPOD_RESULTS WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO_DIR

dataSource.name: Q_34
dataSource.select: SELECT LABOR_ACCIDENT_FLG FROM PEN_CALC_NATIONAL_RESULTS WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = :P_ACC_ACCOUNT_NO_DIR

dataSource.name: Q_36
dataSource.select: SELECT T.LOGO FROM PEN_REPORTS_EFKA_LOGO T WHERE T.STATUS = '1'

textSegment.string: 2. Τα στοιχεία του συνταξιοδοτικού φακέλου από τα οποία προκύπτουν τα εξής:
ΑΝΙΚΑΝΟΤΗΤΑ ΓΙΑ ΚΑΘΕ ΒΙΟΠΟΡΙΣΤΙΚΗ ΕΡΓΑΣΙΑ ΠΡΙΝ ΤΗ
Α. ΑΝΑΛΥΣΗ ΥΠΟΛΟΓΙΣΜΟΥ ΠΟΣΟΥ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΘΑΝΟΝΤΟΣ/ΟΥΣΗΣ Ν.4387/2016:
β. ΑΝΤΑΠΟΔΟΤΙΚΗ: - ΑΡΘΡΑ 14 ΚΑΙ 33 ΤΟΥ Ν. 4387/2016 - ΑΡΘΡΟ 94 ΤΟΥ Ν.4387/2016
ΜΕ ΤΗΝ ΠΑΡΕΛΕΥΣΗ ΤΡΙΕΤΙΑΣ ΘΑ ΕΦΑΡΜΟΣΤΟΥΝ ΟΙ ΟΙΚΕΙΕΣ ΔΙΑΤΑΞΕΙΣ ΤΟΥ ΑΡΘΡΟΥ 12 ΤΟΥ Ν. 4387/2016.
ΣΕ ΠΕΡΙΠΤΩΣΗ ΠΟΥ ΧΟΡΗΓΗΘΗΚΑΝ ΠΟΣΑ ΠΡΟΣΩΡΙΝΗΣ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ, ΘΑ ΓΙΝΕΙ ΣΥΜΨΗΦΙΣΜΟΣ ΜΕ ΤΑ ΠΟΣΑ ΠΟΥ ΘΑ
Αίτηση για μεταβίβαση σύνταξης λόγω θανάτου με αριθμό πρωτοκόλλου
ΗΜΕΡΟΜΗΝΙΑ ΤΕΛΕΣΗΣ ΓΑΜΟΥ (ΕΝΑΡΞΗΣ ΙΣΧΥΟΣ ΣΥΜΦΩΝΟΥ ΣΥΜΒΙΩΣΗΣ) :
ΑΝΙΚΑΝΟΤΗΤΑ ΓΙΑ ΚΑΘΕ ΒΙΟΠΟΡΙΣΤΙΚΗ ΕΡΓΑΣΙΑ ΠΡΙΝ ΤΗ
Α. ΑΝΑΛΥΣΗ ΥΠΟΛΟΓΙΣΜΟΥ ΠΟΣΟΥ ΣΥΝΤΑΞΗΣ ΘΑΝΟΝΤΟΣ/ΟΥΣΗΣ Ν.4387/2016:
β. ΑΝΤΑΠΟΔΟΤΙΚΗ: - ΑΡΘΡΑ 14 ΚΑΙ 33 ΤΟΥ Ν. 4387/2016 - ΑΡΘΡΟ 94 ΤΟΥ Ν.4387/2016
Το παρόν φύλλο υπολογισμού δεν υπόκειται σε ένδικα μέσα

report.webSource:
<%@ taglib uri="/WEB-INF/lib/reports_tld.jar" prefix="rw" %> <%@ page language="java" import="java.io.*" errorPage="/rwerror.jsp" session="false" %> <%@ page contentType="text/html;charset=ISO-8859-1" %> <!-- <rw:report id="report"> <rw:objects id="objects"> </rw:objects> -->
<html>
<head> <meta name="GENERATOR" content="Oracle 11gR1 Reports Developer"/> <title> Your Title </title>
<rw:style id="yourStyle"> <!-- Report Wizard inserts style link clause here --> </rw:style>
</head>
<body>
<rw:dataArea id="yourDataArea"> <!-- Report Wizard inserts the default jsp here --> </rw:dataArea>
</body> </html>
<!-- </rw:report> -->
